description: Execute a skill within the main conversation. Skills provide specialized capabilities and domain knowledge. When a skill is relevant, it should be invoked IMMEDIATELY as the first action.

name.description: The skill name (no arguments). E.g., "pdf" or "xlsx"

description: Trae's context engine that uses natural language to search code. Maintains a real-time index of the codebase. Can retrieve across different programming languages. Only reflects the current state on disk.

information_request.description: A description of the information you need.

target_directories.description: Specific directories to search within. Must use absolute paths.

description: Fast file pattern matching tool that works with any codebase size. Supports glob patterns like "/*.js" or "src/**/*.ts". Returns matching file paths sorted by modification time.

pattern.description: The glob pattern to match files against.

path.description: The directory to search in. Must be absolute path.

description: Lists files and directories in a given path. The path parameter must be an absolute path, not a relative path.

path.description: The absolute path to the directory to list.

ignore.description: List of glob patterns to ignore.

description: A powerful search tool built on ripgrep. Supports full regex syntax. Can filter files by glob pattern or type.

pattern.description: The regular expression pattern to search for in file contents

path.description: File or directory to search in. Defaults to current working directory.

output_mode.description: Output mode: content shows lines, files_with_matches shows paths, count shows counts

type.description: File type to search (e.g., js, py, rust)

-C.description: Number of lines to show before and after each match

head_limit.description: Limit output to first N lines

description: Reads a file from the local filesystem. Can read at most 1000 lines at a time and at least 1 line minimum. Results are returned with line numbers starting at 1.

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to read.

offset.description: The line number to start reading from (must be at least 1).

limit.description: The number of lines to read (must be at least 1).

description: This tool can be used to search the internet. Should be used with caution as frequent searches result in a bad user experience and excessive costs.

query.description: The search query to be executed

num.description: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 5)

lr.description: Language restriction for search results (e.g., 'lang_en' for English)

description: Fetches content from a specified URL and processes it into markdown. Converts HTML to markdown and returns the content. Results may be truncated if the content is very large.

url.description: The URL to fetch content from

description: Delete files from the filesystem. You can delete multiple files in one call. Must ensure files exist before deleting.

file_paths.description: The list of file paths you want to delete. Must be absolute paths.

description: Edit files with search and replace. The old_str must match exactly what exists in the file. Only replaces the first match occurrence.

old_str.description: The SEARCH section, a contiguous chunk of lines to search for.

new_str.description: The REPLACE section to replace into the file.

description: Write content to a file. Will overwrite existing file if it exists. Parent directories will be created if needed.

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to write.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

description: Execute shell commands on the system. For any commands that would require user interaction, assume the user is not available to interact and pass non-interactive flags.

requires_approval.description: Set to true if the command requires user approval.

description: Check the execution status of a previously run command. Returns whether the command is still running, completed, or failed.

command_id.description: The command ID to check status for.

description: Stop a running command by its ID. Use CheckCommandStatus to get the command ID first.
Read and display linter errors and diagnostics from the current workspace. Returns errors, warnings, and hints from language servers and linters.

path.description: Optional path to read diagnostics for. If not provided, returns diagnostics for all files.

description: Create and manage a structured todo list for tracking progress. Each item has a unique id, status (pending/in_progress/completed/cancelled), and content description.

merge.description: Whether to merge with existing todos.

todos.description: JSON string of todo items array. Each item has id, status, and content.

description: Preview a web URL in the IDE's built-in browser. The URL must be a fully-formed valid HTTP/HTTPS URL.

url.description: A complete, valid HTTP/HTTPS URL to open.

description: Collect structured multiple-choice answers from the user. Provide one or more questions with options, and set multiSelect when multi-select is appropriate.

questions.description: JSON string containing questions array with id, question, options, and multiSelect settings.

title.description: Optional title for the questions form.
